# Acknowledgements

This skill consolidates prior work rather than reinventing it.

- grill-with-docs (`mattpocock/skills`, MIT): the converge-to-shared-understanding loop, the
  `CONTEXT.md` glossary, and the ADR selectivity heuristic. Loop 2 and the artefact formats derive
  from it.
- superpowers brainstorming (`obra/superpowers`, MIT): the interactive design conversation and the
  gate that blocks implementation before an approved design.
- Woof (`krazyuniks/woof`): the discovery building blocks (research, think, ideate, synthesise) and
  the synthesis-to-`EPIC.md` contract.
- taches-cc-resources (`lex-christopherson`, MIT): the thinking lenses (consider) and research
  angles the elicitation draws on. Woof's own discovery playbooks descend from the same source.

Licences: all four upstreams are MIT (`mattpocock/skills`, `obra/superpowers`, `lex-christopherson/
taches-cc-resources`, `krazyuniks/woof`). This skill is an adaptation, not a verbatim copy, and the
attributions above satisfy MIT. A formal public redistribution that bundles substantial portions of
an upstream should also carry that upstream's MIT copyright notice.
